2606.22657.title: Foundation Models for Epileptogenic Zone Identification in Drug-Resistant Epilepsy
2606.22657.paper_summary: Accurate identification of the epileptogenic zone (EZ) is essential for seizure freedom after resective surgery in drug-resistant epilepsy, yet seizure freedom rates remain below 50%. We developed EpiiSLM, a dual foundation model system for EZ identification with stereo-electroencephalography (sEEG), by training a signal foundation model on 104,990 minutes of sEEG recordings from the Montreal Neurological Institute & Hospital, while leveraging all recordings regardless of surgical outcome and anchoring EZ biomarker extraction on non-epileptic signals. A language foundation model then integrates sEEG-derived outputs with multimodal clinical information to produce interpretable predictions. Under leave-one-patient-out evaluation, EpiiSLM achieved 0.978 contact-level positive predictive value (PPV), outperforming the seizure onset zone(SOZ)-as-EZ baseline by 15.1% (p < 0.05), and 100% region-level accuracy; on an external dataset, EpiiSLM achieved 0.857 contact-level PPV. EpiiSLM requires only one night of interictal sleep data, suggesting potential to reduce invasive sEEG monitoring duration and improve surgical outcomes.
2606.22657.paper_summary_zh: 準確識別癲癇發作區（EZ）對於藥物抗性癲癇的切除手術後實現無癲癇發作至關重要，但無癲癇發作的比例仍低於50%。我們開發了EpiiSLM，一種用於EZ識別的雙重基礎模型系統，結合立體腦電圖（sEEG），通過在蒙特利爾神經學院和醫院的104,990分鐘sEEG錄音上訓練信號基礎模型，同時利用所有錄音，無論手術結果如何，並將EZ生物標記提取固定在非癲癇信號上。然後，語言基礎模型將sEEG衍生的輸出與多模態臨床信息整合，以生成可解釋的預測。在逐一排除患者的評估中，EpiiSLM達到了0.978的接觸級陽性預測值（PPV），比以癲癇發作起始區（SOZ）作為EZ基準高出15.1%（p < 0.05），並且在區域級別上達到100%的準確率；在外部數據集中，EpiiSLM達到了0.857的接觸級PPV。EpiiSLM只需要一晚的癲癇間歇期睡眠數據，這表明其有潛力減少侵入性sEEG監測的持續時間並改善手術結果。
2606.22657.author: Thi Kieu Khanh Ho et.al.
2606.22657.authors: Thi Kieu Khanh Ho, Thomas Lai, Petr Klimes, Jan Cimbalnik, Martin Pail, Milan Brazdil, Birgit Frauscher, Narges Armanfard
